name: Bishnu Prasad Paudel
profileSummary:
Bishnu Prasad Paudel is a Nepalese politician, who is the vice-chairman of Communist Party of Nepal. Paudel served as the deputy prime minister and Minister of Finance in the Third Dahal cabinet.
He has earlier served as deputy prime minister (2021), and headed other prominent ministries such as Finance, Home Affairs (2021), Industry (2021), Water and Defence (2011).
